title: PGIMER Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Project Technical Support III Posts
description: Postgraduate Institute of Medical Education and Research (PGIMER) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for Project Technical Support III Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in B.Sc can grab this chance and apply for the PGIMER Recruitment 2026 . Interested candidates can apply before the last date of application. If you are looking for more, here is a list of Government Jobs in 2026 that you can all apply for. Use this link for more jobs in Chandigar...
